prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低录取位次分别为约7612名→8125名→9367名→8472名→8721名，整体在7600–9400名区间波动，近三年在8400–9400名之间徘徊，2025年基准约8721名 ，无明显单边趋势；该校在北京市2021–2025年每年仅投放2个招生计划，2026年大幅扩招至32人，扩增幅度达16倍，是本年度最关键的竞争 缓解因素。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第70名，近年排名稳定在64–70名区间，属于中上游211院校；2 026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查，对报考心理有一定抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第81位，评价为「 一般」，短视频平台曝光量偏低；第五轮学科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，三个A-及以上学科，其中考古学为该校传统王牌专业，与 北京市招生专业中的考古学直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在京招生专业主要为考古学（历史必选组）和经济统计学（物理必选组），考古学属冷门专业方向，经济统计 学属财经类（社会热度分化观望）；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约30%，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；西北大学位于陕西 省西安市，距北京较远，属于跨省异地就读；该校在北京市招生占比极小（历年仅2人），2026年虽扩至32人，但绝对数量仍有限，地域偏好对北京考生报考意愿影响中性偏弱。 综合2026年招生计划从2人扩增至32人（16倍）这一最大利好、北京考生总数增加约30%带来的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，扩招效应远大 于考生增加和声誉负面效应，预计2026年最低录取位次将大幅后移。预测最低位次约82000名，区间81500–82500名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年西北大学在京大幅扩招，预测位次区间约81500–82500名，报考难度较往年显著降低。位次在预测区间内的考生可将该校作为稳妥选择，以二档专业为主；位次明显优于区 间上限（<81500名）可冲刺一档考古学王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（约82500名）建议以三档专业保底。注意该校专业选科要求分为历史必选和物理必选/物化必选两类，报考时 需根据自身选科情况合理搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were approximately 7612 → 8125 → 9367 → 8472 → 8721, fluctuating within the 7600–9400 range, hovering between 8400–9400 in recent three years, with a 2025 baseline of about 8721, showing no clear unilateral trend; the university only allocated 2 enrollment slots annually in Beijing from 2021 to 2025, but in 2026 it significantly expanded to 32 slots, a 16-fold increase, which is the most critical competition alleviation factor this year.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 70th, with stable rankings in the 64–70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, for which the university has established a special working group to investigate, exerting a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 81st, with a rating of 'average', and low exposure on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology received an A, and Software Engineering received an A-, with three disciplines at A- or above, among which Archaeology is the university's traditional flagship major, directly corresponding to the Archaeology major in the Beijing enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Beijing are mainly Archaeology (History required group) and Economic Statistics (Physics required group); Archaeology is a niche major direction, while Economic Statistics belongs to the finance and economics category (social popularity is divided and wait-and-see); the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 30% from 65,434 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, far from Beijing, making it a cross-province off-campus study option; the university's enrollment proportion in Beijing is extremely small (only 2 people in previous years), and although it expands to 32 people in 2026, the absolute number is still limited, with regional preference having a neutral to weak impact on Beijing candidates' willingness to apply. Considering the biggest positive factor of the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 2 to 32 slots (16 times), the intensified competition due to a 30% increase in Beijing candidates, the negative reputation, and average Douyin popularity, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase and reputation negative effects, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to significantly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 82,000, with a range of 81,500–82,500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Northwest University significantly expands enrollment in Beijing, with a predicted ranking range of about 81,500–82,500, making admission difficulty significantly lower than previous years. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range can consider this university as a safe choice, focusing on Tier 2 majors; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<81,500) can aim for the Tier 1 flagship Archaeology major; those with rankings near the lower limit (about 82,500) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Note that the university's major subject requirements are divided into History required and Physics required/Physics and Chemistry required categories, so candidates should reasonably match based on their own subject selection.
